'''Dathka Graush's holocron''' was a [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]] created by [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Dathka Graush]].

Dathka Graush lived about seven millennia before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], and was skilled in the use of [[Sith alchemy/Legends|Sith alchemy]]. He was entombed on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] roughly fifty years after he had won one of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] periodic civil wars and established a dynasty that ruled over two-thirds of the planet.

Graush's [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] was placed in Graush's tomb along with his [[Sith sword]] and a [[Sith talisman/Legends|Sith amulet]].
